feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: I love Danish grocery stores 😭 they're obsessed with rhubarb as much as i am #denmark #danish #dansk #netto #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #denmark🇩🇰 #kobenhavn #groceryshopping #whimsysoul #rhubarb
entry.content: I love Danish grocery stores 😭 they're obsessed with rhubarb as much as i am #denmark #danish #dansk #netto #copenhagen #copenhagentiktok #denmark🇩🇰 #kobenhavn #groceryshopping #whimsysoul #rhubarb

entry.title: Nobody in my country knows about Eurovision but I'm obsessed 😝 what's your favorite song this year? #eurovision #eurovison2024 #eurovisionsongcontest
entry.content: Nobody in my country knows about Eurovision but I'm obsessed 😝 what's your favorite song this year? #eurovision #eurovison2024 #eurovisionsongcontest

entry.title: curvy girl sundresses 🤝 Copenhagen botanical gardens. Wearing my fave dress of the season by @anthropologie + my go to travel purse by @ardencove #ootd #curvy #copenhagen #curvyfashion #curvystyle #curvyconfidence #whimsysoul #size12 #size14 #copenhagen
entry.content: curvy girl sundresses 🤝 Copenhagen botanical gardens. Wearing my fave dress of the season by @anthropologie + my go to travel purse by @ardencove #ootd #curvy #copenhagen #curvyfashion #curvystyle #curvyconfidence #whimsysoul #size12 #size14 #copenhagen

entry.title: Finland was so unexpected 😳 who else is watching tonight!? #eurovision #eurovision2024 #eurovisionsongcontest
entry.content: Finland was so unexpected 😳 who else is watching tonight!? #eurovision #eurovision2024 #eurovisionsongcontest

entry.title: Replying to @Idk11 I went to Eurovision!! Today we saw Semi Final 1 afternoon preview and OMG this year is so good!! We met up with my pal Olivia and started off by taking the train from Copenhagen to Malmö, Sweden and checked out the Village first before
entry.content: Replying to @Idk11 I went to Eurovision!! Today we saw Semi Final 1 afternoon preview and OMG this year is so good!! We met up with my pal Olivia and started off by taking the train from Copenhagen to Malmö, Sweden and checked out the Village first before

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’
entry.content: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
